---
name: ui-refresh
description: Describe when to use this prompt
---

- Take the design files from here D:\Brian\workspaces\github-allthatjava-one\thjr-common-ui then apply to this project. Keep the current project main body parts with current project code between {/* Main content - Start */} and {/* Main content - End */}. And also keep the page Title and meta description.
- Keep all common components files under src/components, and update the code in those files to match the design files. For example, update the Navbar component to match the design file for the Navbar.
